title: Jinx minecraft skin/texture pack [Nøx]
description: Skin and texture pack of the character jinx from arcane/LoL
body:
Info on getting the skin at the bottom!ALL RIGHTS RESERVED TO RIOT GAMES [Creators of Arcane and LoL /// Owners of the character Jinx]

Thank you for downloading (or even looking at) the texture pack! This was the work of myself [Nøx 2025]

Please don't say that my work is your own work! I forbid anyone from saying that this was their work! thank you <3

THIS PACK USES A MINECRAFT FEATURE CALLED CUSTOM_MODEL_DATA, More information on this topic can be found at the minecraft wiki. In the pack there is a file called "Read_Me!.txt" Open this for the commands to get the custom modeled items. If you loose/delete this file here is the information again:

This pack uses Custom_Model_Data for the models, In order to get the custom items you will need admin/creative mode.

The commands for the items are:

Jinx’s hair:
/give @p blue_dye[custom_model_data={strings:["jinx hair"]}] 1

Jinx’s gun:
/give @p bow[custom_model_data={strings:["jinx pistol"]}] 1

[!] THE SKINS ARE LOCATED IN A FOLDER CALLED "jinx skins" THERE YOU WILL FIND BOTH SLIM AND WIDE VERSIONS OF THE SKIN [!] join my discord server: 

https://discord.gg/ksMFBJPKjK
